scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute asd --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute asd --local --file=./migrations/0002_seed_baseline.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute asd --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute asd --remote --file=./migrations/0002_seed_baseline.sql
